Damascus Clad 10Cr15CoMoV G10 Handle Bread Knife 240 mm

Elevate your bread slicing capabilities with our Damascus Clad 10Cr15CoMoV G10 Handle Bread Knife, a premium addition to any wholesale kitchen supply inventory. Perfect for wholesale orders to restaurants, bakeries, and gourmet food retailers, this knife meets professional standards for precision and reliability.
